title: hieracium pleuroleucum
intro: Hieracium pleuroleucum, also known as Mountain Hawkweed, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and possibly aiding in the treatment of digestive issues and skin conditions. Hieracium pleuroleucum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
